name: Command Shell in Externally Accessible Directory
description: A command shell executable exists in a publicly accessible web directory such as /cgi-bin/, allowing an attacker to execute arbitrary commands on the web server.
detection_pattern: STRUCTURAL node representing a web-accessible directory (e.g., cgi-bin) contains a shell executable that connects directly to an EGRESS node. An EXTERNAL actor can reach the shell via INGRESS without AUTH mediation.
